---
title: "Earthquake Report"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| echo: false
library(tidyverse)

clean <- read_csv("data/clean/earthquakes-clean.csv",
                  show_col_types = FALSE)
```

## Overview

In the past 30 days, USGS recorded `r nrow(clean)` earthquakes of magnitude 4.5 or greater. The strongest was a magnitude `r max(clean$mag)` near `r clean$place[which.max(clean$mag)]`.

## Top 10 Strongest Earthquakes

```{r}
#| label: table-top10
#| echo: false
clean |>
  slice_max(mag, n = 10) |>
  select(date, mag, place) |>
  arrange(desc(mag)) |>
  knitr::kable(col.names = c("Date", "Magnitude", "Location"))
```

## Magnitude Distribution

```{r}
#| label: fig-magnitude
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "Distribution of earthquake magnitudes (M4.5+) over the past 30 days."
ggplot(clean, aes(x = mag)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.2, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Earthquake Magnitudes",
    x = "Magnitude",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
